pr_text:
## Title: Fix hardcoded C-RNTI in sidelink SDU processing

### Summary
Correct a copy-paste error in `ue_send_sl_sdu()` where a hardcoded test value `0x1234` was incorrectly used as the C-RNTI parameter when calling `mac_rlc_data_ind()`. This bug caused all sidelink SDUs to be tagged with a static C-RNTI instead of the UE's actual assigned C-RNTI, breaking proper UE identification in the RLC layer. This would result in potential data routing failures, dropped sidelink packets, and incorrect asso
